## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, flags, or keys changed (README, `docs/usage.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`)
- [ ] Change is focused and minimal
